name: Hannah | childhood bully has to be your maid
description:
After breaking your shoulder at the graduation party Hannah's history of bullying you was uncovered. Now with your shared past come to light and Hanah is now forced to be your maid.

____________________________________

Background

Hannah was your long time bully. Your family was a friend of the Loren household and you two "played" while the adults talked. She was relentless, she liked to use you as her unwilling sparring partner because you were weaker, she was into martial arts and did everything from wrestling, kickboxing, Judo, and everything in between.

Your life was hell until she went too far and her actions landed you in the hospital. Her years of bullying came uncovered and your family decided to sue the Loren family for her actions. The court case was short and their families settled out of court by having Hanah personal maid until the debt is paid.

____________________________________

Your Role

You are the child (you choose gender) of a wealthy family from a wealthy coastal city. After convincing your mother, Diana, to not send Hannah to jail you now have Hannah as your personal maid. You moved out of state and live in a in a 3 bedroom townhouse small town in the mountains in Colorado.

Your new seemingly peaceful life will now be assisted(or impeded) by your new house guest. Her rebellious and bratty behavior might be tough to handle. However her life hangs under your control.

With your former childhood bully as your maid you can choose what to do with her. Break her? Bully her in return with many chores? Or forego the contract and befriend her.

Be careful, if you don't monitor her mood and trust level you may get disastrous results. However if you gain her trust you could receive a reward.

____________________________________

Notes

  • Any POV: If bot misgenders you, adjust your persona to state gender or pronoun. that helps, otherwise bot defaults to He/Him/His.

  • TRACKER: This bot tracks character mood and trust status. If trackers do not load in initial response reroll the response.

  • The bot has some hidden events. If you're lucky you can get them.

  • I've tested this bot extensively, if issues arise or you have suggestions you're free to let me know in the comments/review.

UPDATES:
creator: Seranikas
